---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the use case.

**Which area does this touch?**
- [ ] Fetching (new platform support / bypass improvements)
- [ ] Editor (new effect, control, or preset)
- [ ] AI Enhance (quality, speed, or new model)
- [ ] Export / batch workflow
- [ ] Other

**Proposed approach (optional)**
If you have thoughts on implementation, share them here.
